version.description: Schema version this data structure conforms to

platformVersion.description: Kubernetes version.  Operator versions are supported only on a range of Kubernetes releases.

namespace.description: Namespace collected.  All operator and cluster logs come from the same namespace.

toolVersion.description: Version of tooling (cbopinfo) used to collect the logs.

commandLine.description: Command line arguments used to collect the logs.

image.description: The container image the operator is using.

logPath.description: The path to the operator logs, relative to the archive root.

clusters.description: A list of all Couchbase cluster resources that were collected.

name.description: The name of the cluster, this is the metadata name of the resource, not necessarily the Couchbase cluster name.

image.description: The container image the cluster is using, should contain the Couchbase version.  Certain versions are valid only for certain operator versions.

resourcePath.description: The path to the Couchbase cluster YAML specification, relative to the archive root.

eventsPath.description: The path to the Couchbase cluster events YAML, relative to the archive root.  This contains a list of Kubernetes events, that can be sorted by the JSON pointer /metadata/creationTimestamp.
